issue_body_preview:
### Describe the issue

When quickly moving the mouse from one `cursor-target` element to another and then stopping the mouse, the cursor animation will changes to the end state of the animation inside the `leaveHandler` function until the next mouse movement.
Specific like this:

![Image](https://g
test_description_zh: 在页面上放置多个 cursor-target 元素，快速将鼠标从一个 cursor-target 元素移动到另一个 cursor-target 元素后立即停止鼠标移动，观察自定义光标的动画状态。
expected_result_zh: 快速在多个 cursor-target 元素之间移动鼠标并停止后，自定义光标应立即显示为当前悬停目标元素对应的动画状态（进入状态），而不是短暂显示离开动画的结束状态或出现闪烁/错误的动画过渡。
